transcript: Hello. My name’s Dale Pigtale. I’m calling from Mission Beach Parking Enforcement—
I’m doing okay. Your name, again, is…?
My name’s Dale, I’m with Mission Beach—
Okay, do you have a last name, Dale?
Is this a—Is this a legitimate call?
Okay! Thank you! I’m sorry. Okay!—
I just had some, ah, weird encounters in that area lately. Didn’t mean to offend you—
—I have a report on my desk here that—
—apparently you were operating an unsafe vehicle and did some damage to some parked vehicles in the area there.
—Not at all. Actually, I’ve had somebody, ah, damage my vehicle; that’s why I’m asking you.
Ah, well, I have a report here, uh—some erratic driving and that you, ah—
—did some damage to two parked cars.

—I’m not gonna entertain this because my car was, in fact, damaged there and there was someone who left a very offensive note on the car there, threatening me and sexual violence against me, there, and obviously has been, ah, targeting me. And, ah, I have the note that they left and, ah, I will not be responding to your comment. If you would like to respond with my lawyers I will do that, but other than that, I am being targeted by somebody unfairly, there, who I believe is a patron of that beach, who is there every single day and has been obsessively targeting me, there. And I am no longer, again, going to respond to you or anyone else—
—You can’t give me a ticket over the phone, sorry.—
—How are you gonna give me a ticket over the phone? Goodbye!
—If you wanna use a credit card—
Hey, yeah, this is Loco. I just moved in in the neighborhood here. How ya doin’?
Excellent! Ah, we have the same dentist, it turns out; that’s where I got your phone number from, so [delay]

Yeah! So that was where I got it from; I told him, ah, lived here and he gave me the number. I’m sure you’re busy. I don’t know anybody else in the area. I got a new bike. I was gonna, maybe, stop by. Maybe you can show me how to ride it. I never learned how to ride the bicycle, so [delay]
No, I think you got the wrong guy, here. First of all, my Doctor is a female and, ah, uh, uh, I don’t—I don’t teach bicycle riding.
Well, no! I know you’re not an instructor but I could really use the help; I need to ride around, you know, learn the area!—
—So I’ll just drop by and we’ll just go—
—No, don’t drop by! Don’t drop by!—
—Don’t drop by; this is too weird!
[saxophone] Well, just for a couple minutes. It won’t take long; I’m a quick learner—real quick learner! [sax]—
—No—no—no—no, man! This is too bizarre. We can’t have this.
Well, I got a saxophone I could give ya, free of charge, just for showing me. S—I mean, listen: [sniffs] [sax]—
—No! No, man, no. No deal. Can’t—I can’t have anything more to do with this. This is too weird and I don’t teach bicycle riding, okay? Bye!—
Duram’s [?] office. This is Sharon. Can I help you?
Hi! I came in there ‘bout three, four days ago—
—I had, ah, some eye care done up here. And I’m just seeing lines and, uh, different shapes. I’m seeing a triangle every time I turn around up here. I’m not sure what’s goin’ on! [exhales] [delay]
Knox. [exhales] Okay? [delay] I had my pupils dilated—
—and I can’t tell what the heck’s goin’ on over here! [exhales]
Okay, and what’s your birth date?
—Well, it’s already passed; it happened last month, but…
—But I’m seeing spheres and I’m seeing brick walls and I can’t see!—
—I—ma’am, I can’t see over here okay?! [delay]
—I need the actual birth date and year—
And I—Yes, I can’t see straight, ma’am! I’m—
Every time I turn around, I’m running into things—
—I’m trying to get your birth date so I can find your file.
—glass of water and I poured it over my shoulder, ‘cause I can’t even see what I’m doin’. I—It’s a mess!
You can call back when you’re more serious!
Hi, yes! My name’s Ernie Quasimodo. How are you?
Yeah, I’ve got a few hundred words written that I wanted to send to you, ah, on this, ah, reincarnated pterodactyl. [exhales] Have you been following this at all?
No, I don’t have any idea what you’re talking about.
Uh, it’s a reincarnated pterodactyl, ah, out of the Buddakan area. i’ve got about 500 words and just some, ah, kind of low-res pictures. I’m working on getting better ones. [exhales]
Um, that’s really not even my forte; I’m—I’m into ghosts and—and hauntings and poltergeist phenomena.
Well, in that same area of the Buddakan, there’s a tranquilized Chupacabra that they’ve got in captivity at this point in time.
Well, you—you’d actually be better off speaking to somebody in cryptozoology; they’re more savvy with that type of material than I am.
Uh, I don’t know how to reach those folks. How ‘bout that euthanized Ogopogo that there was recently photos—

—Again, th—Again, you’re all talking about cryptozoology; you’re talking about, you know, unknown creatures and things of that nature. I’m into ghost, haunting, and poltergeist phenomena; that’s what I do.
Have you heard of the Canimal Bat?
Hey, uh, it’s Ernie! How are ya?
I—As I told you yesterday, I’m not really into that kinda stuff.
Buddy, I got this whole thing with this, ah, reincarnated pterodactyl. I gotta h—
Ah, I told you yesterday: ghosts, hauntings, and poltergeist phenomena.
‘Kay, but this tranquilized Chupacabra! Don’t you wanna look at it? I’ve got video—
They’re gonna miniaturize this thing and send it around! They’re gonna send it to Calcu—
—Uh, we—You need to talk to somebody, as I told you yesterday, in cryptozoology that [would have] more of an expertise in it than I would.
Yeah, but let’s look at some video together! They’re gonna euthanize this, ah, Ogopogo—
—No, let’s not. I’m really not interested, sir.
They got a Ogopogo at the Buddakan here!
Hey! I’ll tell ya what, I’ll send you a PayPal payment just as a deposit, just to send you some video and have your opinion sent back to me. Just send me an email! [sfx]
I’m not an expert so I can’t give you an expert opinion.
On any of ‘em! I’m not a cryptozoologist; don’t you understand that?
Yeah, but you—you’re interested in the pterodactyl, aren’t ye?
No, I’m not! I’m interested in ghost, haunting, and poltergeist phenomena!
Okay, well, then this video of the Chupacabra’s gonna drive ya wild!—
—Chupacabra is a—is a cryptozoological manifestation; it has nothing to do with ghosts, hauntings, or poltergeist phenomena.
Okay, but I talked to Gavin Conchlan.
That might be find with him, but—
—I don’t know anything about Gavin whoever-you-just-mentioned—
Gavin Conchlan said that you could appreciate my video tape that I got here. [sfx]
I don’t even know Gavin, so I don’t know how he’s recommending people to—to—for me to look at cryptozoological stuff.
They’re gonna euthanize a dragonfish if I don’t get together with ya here!—
—You know, sir, I really don’t wanna get any more—
—into this and I w—really wish you would stop calling here.
I’ll send ya a PayPal payment, okay? Just for an hour ‘o your time!—

—No I really don’t want a PayPal payment. I really just, you know—if you really wanna talk to somebody who’s really interested, Google, “cryptozoologist,” here in the United States and there’s a whole bunch that will pull up.
I’ll bring some nachos over. We could watch this video tape. It’ll be dynamite! [sfx]
Hi, yeah, I was lookin’ for, like, a 30-day loan.
So, w—the loan period’s 30 days but you don’t have to pick up the loan. After that 30, you just have to pay the interest charge and every time you pay the interest charge, it—
Okay, great! I’ve got a, ah, Lebanese lamb. What would I get monetarily for somethin’ like that? [siren]
Hey, yeah, I think we got cut off up ‘ere!
Uh, no, I hung up on you ‘cause I figured you were messin’ with me.
Messin’ with you? I’m just tryin’ to get a dollar amount. [siren]

—well you and your lamb can go fuck themselves. If you’re that retarded to think a pawn shop would take a live animal and I have to explain that to you, I’m surprised you can breathe on your own! So don’t cop an att—
—Hey, how ‘bout I come up there and body blow! Body blow!—
—Alright, cool, yeah! Come on up, bud! I live here. I’m here ’til seven. Come by any time!
[reverb] Body blow! Body blow! How’s that sound?
[snickers] Yeah! Yeah, no, you’re not going to but go ahead—
—Hey, tough guy! I got a machete! What do you think of that? I can bring it up ‘ere.
Yeah! [delay] I bet! ‘Cause it’s gonna be body blow! Body blow! and then my frickin’ machete, ya feel me?
Uh, yeah, odds are you’re not comin’ up here. Have a great day!
Yeah, this is Stevie Buckeye. I’m your new neighbor here. I got your number from the mailman.
There’s been some theft in the neighborhood, okay, guy? My neighbor and myself are missin’ some stuff. I just wanna drop by and get a saliva sample from ya just to exclude you.
You call me here again, I’ll fuckin’ kill ya!
Look, we just wanna swab ya and exclude ya! That’s all we’re trying to go, okay?
[in background] Who the fuck are you talking to, dude?!
Listen right now! Listen to this fuckin’ idiot! Go ‘head, please! Keep fucking talking!
Hey, I’m your new neighbor! We’re gonna swab ya and that’s all we’re trying to do! We’re just trying to exclude you, man!
[to woman] Listen to this fuckin’ idiot!
Hey, um, you need to discontinue this [conversation], mhm? And, um, eliminate. Our number. From. Your phone! What I just got done saying—
—Once we get the saliva sample, we’ll be done!—
Eliminate. Our number. From your phone. Right now! Otherwise, I will have lawyers on your shit! You got it?! Good!
W—We need your saliva, too, you understand?
Yeah, buddy, I want your and the lady’s saliva tonight, alright? That’s two samples we want tonight, you understand?
Do you understand what the hell I’m talkin’ ‘bout? You can’t even ask for that!
—Well, that’s nice. I can ask you for a fuckin’ sperm sample and a fuckin’ blood sample. It doesn’t mean you’re gonna give it to me!
Well, I’m not guilty, am I?
Guilty of what? What the fuck are you talkin’ about?
There’s been some thefts in the area and we just wanna exclude you, so we need your saliva sample, period! That’s it! Bob’s your uncle!—

—Okay, well, first of all, we don’t steal. Second of all, there’s no need for us to steal, because we probably own more than you do. So, you can suck my dick, lick my left nut, and suck my asshole, bro!
Look, why don’t you just be profession’? [delay]—
—You can’t ask for a saliva fuckin’ sample! Who the fuck are you to ask for anything?!
I’m new to the area, here, tough guy! [delay]

Hey, it’s, ah, Jackie Broadband. I’m just new to the area here. My neighbor and I have had some stuff go missing. There’s been some theft in the area! So I just wanted to stop by and get a saliva sample from you just so we can exclude you from the investigation, okay?
—So how did you get my phone number?—
Yeah, I—I have no idea who you are, so you’re not doing nothing with me.
We just need your saliva, that’s it. Just takes a minutes ‘o your time!—
—I don’t really care what you need! [unintelligible]—
—I know a lip-reader. He said he saw you talkin’ about this.—
—So you gonna say he’s a liar? [sniffs]
Yeah. Lose my fuckin’ number. How’s that? You understand English?
Why don’t you just let us swab ya and get it over with? We just wanna exclude ya—
—Why don’t you lose my fuckin’ number before I call the police on ya?! Yeah, you do that!—
—Are you sayin’ the lip-reader’s a liar? What are you sayin’?
I’m sayin’ you’re a fuckin’ asshole!
And you sound like your mother’s a fuckin’ f*ggot! Is she?
Listen, just give us your saliva and we’ll call it good: Bob’s your uncle, end ‘o story, okay?
—I hate f*ggots! You need to be shot! You have no life! Fuck off! We’re done! And lose my numba!
Hey, this is Guido Frisbee! How’re ya doin’?
Oh, I still don’t know who you are. Why don’t you explain [to] me who you—who you working for, why you calling me?
Oh, yeah! My name’s Guido. I just live down the street from you and I was gonna stop by and fix up your yard, trim the grass and pull the weeds and everything—
—Did I ask—Did I ask you to do that?
Uh, I do that for you and you just give me $75 and we’re done, okay?
And I don’t wanna give you seventy-five cents. I have a gardener! What’s wrong with you?
—I don’t know you and I don’t hire anybody. I have people to work for me!
I’m gonna do the best job ever on your grass, okay?—
—Did I tell you to do it?! You lay off before I call the police on you!
[Man (4), Joe Sauer’s grandson, can be heard conversing with Joe in background]
What is this here? Is this—
—Why is it so cold in here?
—If you walk out here, it’s like ten degrees warmer. You walk in there, it’s freezing—
You should put a portable heater in here.
Hey, Joe! I’m gonna bring you a portable heater, okay?
Lemme explain [to] you, you sonofabitch: I have a soldier came here, my grandson! And he’s gonna shoot you to pieces. To pieces, he’s gonna shoot you, you sonofabitch!
Hi! What’s goin’ on? This is Guido!
Oh, I’m new in the neighborhood here. I got a heater for Joe—
—Just a hundred bucks! That’s all I need. It’s a good heater—
—Dude, you come over, I swear to god, I will fucking blow your nuts off!
You need a heater, I have one for sale! It’s a hundred dollars. Puts out so much heat, you won’t believe it—
—Okay, yeah! Come with a heater and see what I’ll fucking do to you, piece of shit!—
—I’m a fucking veteran; trust me, I have no problem killing you!—
—And I will fucking kill you and your entire fucking family!
Hey, forget the heater! Why don’t you just lower the temperature right the frick back down, ya feel me? [sfx]
